# scenario: VE query on a V8/V9-family device
# Captured 2026-04-17 from a real 8v17.0-R23 unit at /dev/ttyUSB0
# (Prolific PL2303, 115200 baud, unit_id=B). Note the date format —
# `<Mon> <DD> <YYYY>,<HH:MM:SS>` rather than ISO `YYYY-MM-DD`. The
# parser accepts both formats; design §16.1 #4.

> BVE
< B   8v17.0-R23 Nov 27 2019,15:28:45
